name: com.translatize/mcp
description: Read, search, edit and branch Translatize translation labels and fill missing translations.

environmentVariables.name: TRANSLATIZE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Translatize integration API token (an "mcni_..." string), bound to one project and branch. Create it under Project Settings -> Integrations at https://app.translatize.com.

environmentVariables.name: TRANSLATIZE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL including the /v1 segment. Defaults to https://api.translatize.com/v1.

environmentVariables.name: TRANSLATIZE_APP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Web-app base URL used to build review links. Defaults to https://app.translatize.com.
